---
description: "Use when researching APIs, SDKs, platform capabilities, vendor behavior, implementation details, or integration constraints. Never assume; always use the docs first."
name: "Docs First"
---

# Docs-First Rules

- Never assume. Always use the docs.
- Do not infer unsupported features from marketing language or incomplete examples.
- If two documentation sections conflict, call out the conflict explicitly and choose the safer interpretation.
- When the docs do not answer the question, say that clearly and request or fetch the missing source instead of guessing.
